description: Defense-in-depth probe for the dual-engine HTML pipeline (scraper html5ever 0.39 + ammonia html5ever 0.35). Carries a mixed-case <SCRIPT> tag and a comment-wrapped <script>. The mixed-case SCRIPT must fire html_script_stripped, and the sanitized body must contain no alert() or document.cookie payload. Authoring note: a CDATA-wrapped <script> variant was tested and revealed a real scraper-vs-ammonia divergence (inner text survived in body_text as a literal alert string). It is intentionally omitted from this fixture pending a follow-up that locks down expected behavior. If a future html5ever bump changes either engine, this fixture's snapshot will diff and force review.
